claim_text: Measured leakage magnitude does not certify reliance.
caveat: graph_kl->R3 is negative at seed0 (RECOMPUTED_SIGN_ONLY, n=42) and in the frozen pooled summary (FROZEN_NOT_RECOMPUTABLE, n=126, seeds1/2 pruned); do NOT state as a full n=126 recomputation.

claim_text: Task-head alignment is closer to reliance than raw leakage in frozen CIGL R3.
caveat: Spearman difference (align-graph_kl) excludes 0 at seed0; alignment is correctly (positively) signed and leakage wrongly (negatively) signed. NOT a validated estimator; association is dataset-heterogeneous (2a sig, 2015 ns) and within-group partial betas are ns.
linear subject decode driven to chance by LEACE on both backbones; a nonlinear MLP residual persists (erasable != fully removed).

claim_text: Erasure strength does not certify target benefit.
caveat: benefit_claimable=0/40 cells; corr(E,target_bAcc)=-0.4204 [-0.6824,-0.1133] (negative, excludes 0 -> more removal, worse target).
NLL move flagged non-specific in 1/8 LEACE-vs-random_k cells (canonical 2a-TSMNet); not universal across datasets -> claim scoped to flagged cells.
BNCI2014_001 drop 0.0736, gate 0.4888; BNCI2015_001 drop 0.088, gate 0.5723 (descriptive; no per-branch leakage/reliance).
RQ4 quantitative status BLOCKED_MISSING_METRIC for every branch; two HIGH missing metrics (per-branch leakage probe, per-branch R3). Blocked, not failed.
source-only + target-unlabeled CMI control closed (CIGL_70, CMI_SYNTHESIS_01, CITA_03); FSR does not reopen.
target-unlabeled adaptation improves target +0.037..+0.093 (seed0 only, no seeds1/2); must be walled off from CMI-control; support-only for the FSR thesis.

claim_text: FSR is an audit framework, not a new DG method.
caveat: the deliverable is the measurement->reliance->control audit ladder + the measurable!=relied-upon / erasable!=beneficial findings; no positive DG method is proposed.
